raw_sql:
WITH directors AS (
    SELECT ci_dir.person_id AS director_id, ci_dir.movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
actors AS (
    SELECT ci_act.person_id AS actor_id, ci_act.movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_act
    WHERE ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
    SELECT
        d.director_id,
        a.actor_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count
    FROM directors d
    JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) >= 3
)
SELECT
    nd.name AS director,
    na.name AS actor,
    p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
directors AS (
    SELECT ci_dir.person_id AS director_id, ci_dir.movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
actors AS (
    SELECT ci_act.person_id AS actor_id, ci_act.movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_act
    WHERE ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
    SELECT
        d.director_id,
        a.actor_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count
    FROM directors d
    JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) >= 3
)
SELECT
    nd.name AS director,
    na.name AS actor,
    p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
directors AS (
    SELECT ci_dir.person_id AS director_id, ci_dir.movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
actors AS (
    SELECT ci_act.person_id AS actor_id, ci_act.movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_act
    WHERE ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
    SELECT
        d.director_id,
        a.actor_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count,
        array_agg(DISTINCT t.title ORDER BY t.title) AS films
    FROM directors d
    JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id <> a.actor_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) >= 3
)
SELECT
    nd.name AS director,
    na.name AS actor,
    p.film_count,
    p.films
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH key_pairs AS (
    SELECT nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor,
           p.director_id, p.actor_id
    FROM (VALUES
        ('Jordan, Neil', 'Rea, Stephen'),
        ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny'),
        ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
        ('Farrelly, Bobby', 'Docky'),
        ('Lee, Spike', 'Turturro, John')
    ) AS v(dname, aname)
    JOIN name nd ON nd.name = v.dname
    JOIN name na ON na.name = v.aname
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT ci_dir.person_id AS director_id, ci_act.person_id AS actor_id
        FROM cast_info ci_dir
        JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        WHERE ci_dir.person_id = nd.id
          AND ci_act.person_id = na.id
          AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
          AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
        LIMIT 1
    ) p
),
pair_movies AS (
    SELECT kp.director, kp.actor, t.id AS movie_id
    FROM key_pairs kp
    JOIN cast_info ci_dir ON ci_dir.person_id = kp.director_id
        AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id = kp.actor_id
        AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
)
SELECT pm.director, pm.actor, mi.info AS genre, COUNT(*) AS film_count
FROM pair_movies pm
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = pm.movie_id
  AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
GROUP BY pm.director, pm.actor, mi.info
ORDER BY pm.director, pm.actor, film_count DESC;

WITH pair_movies AS (
    SELECT kp.director, kp.actor, t.id AS movie_id
    FROM (VALUES
        ('Jordan, Neil', 'Rea, Stephen'),
        ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny'),
        ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
        ('Lee, Spike', 'Turturro, John'),
        ('Jordan, Neil', 'Rea, Stephen')
    ) AS kp(director, actor)
    JOIN name nd ON nd.name = kp.director
    JOIN name na ON na.name = kp.actor
    JOIN cast_info ci_dir ON ci_dir.person_id = nd.id
        AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id = na.id
        AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
company_counts AS (
    SELECT pm.director, pm.actor, cn.name AS company, COUNT(*) AS film_count
    FROM pair_movies pm
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = pm.movie_id
        AND mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    GROUP BY pm.director, pm.actor, cn.name
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
    ORDER BY pm.director, pm.actor, film_count DESC
)
SELECT * FROM company_counts
LIMIT 40;

WITH pair_movies AS (
    SELECT kp.director, kp.actor, t.id AS movie_id
    FROM (VALUES
        ('Jordan, Neil', 'Rea, Stephen'),
        ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny'),
        ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
        ('Lee, Spike', 'Turturro, John')
    ) AS kp(director, actor)
    JOIN name nd ON nd.name = kp.director
    JOIN name na ON na.name = kp.actor
    JOIN cast_info ci_dir ON ci_dir.person_id = nd.id
        AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id = na.id
        AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT pm.director, pm.actor, k.keyword, COUNT(*) AS film_count
    FROM pair_movies pm
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = pm.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
    GROUP BY pm.director, pm.actor, k.keyword
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, film_count
FROM keyword_counts
ORDER BY director, actor, film_count DESC
LIMIT 50;

WITH pair_movies AS (
    SELECT kp.director, kp.actor, t.id AS movie_id
    FROM (VALUES
        ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny'),
        ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
        ('Lee, Spike', 'Turturro, John')
    ) AS kp(director, actor)
    JOIN name nd ON nd.name = kp.director
    JOIN name na ON na.name = kp.actor
    JOIN cast_info ci_dir ON ci_dir.person_id = nd.id
        AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id = na.id
        AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT pm.director, pm.actor, k.keyword, COUNT(*) AS film_count
    FROM pair_movies pm
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = pm.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
    GROUP BY pm.director, pm.actor, k.keyword
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, film_count
FROM keyword_counts
ORDER BY director, actor, film_count DESC
LIMIT 60;

WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
dir_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
act_roles AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress')),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count,
        AVG(mii_votes.info::float) AS avg_votes,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mi_genre.info) AS distinct_genres
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii_votes ON mii_votes.movie_id = t.id
        AND mii_votes.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    LEFT JOIN movie_info mi_genre ON mi_genre.movie_id = t.id
        AND mi_genre.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM dir_role)
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM act_roles)
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY ci_dir.person_id, ci_act.person_id
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN film_count = 1 THEN '1 film (one-off)'
         WHEN film_count = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN film_count BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS collaboration_tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_votes)::numeric, 0) AS avg_votes_per_film,
    ROUND(AVG(distinct_genres)::numeric, 2) AS avg_distinct_genres
FROM pair_films
GROUP BY collaboration_tier
ORDER BY MIN(film_count);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (pair_films.film_count = 1) THEN '1 film (one-off)'::text WHEN (pair_films.film_count = 2) THEN '2 films'::text WHEN ((pair_films.film_count >= 3) AND (pair_films.film_count <= 5)) THEN '3-5 films'::text ELSE '6+ films'::text END

raw_sql:
WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        t.id AS movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) OVER (PARTITION BY ci_dir.person_id, ci_act.person_id) AS pair_total
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
pair_genre_counts AS (
    SELECT
        pf.director_id,
        pf.actor_id,
        pf.pair_total,
        mi.info AS genre,
        COUNT(DISTINCT pf.movie_id) AS genre_film_count
    FROM pair_films pf
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = pf.movie_id
        AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.pair_total, mi.info
),
pair_top_genre AS (
    SELECT
        director_id, actor_id, pair_total,
        MAX(genre_film_count) AS top_genre_count
    FROM pair_genre_counts
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, pair_total
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN pair_total = 1 THEN '1 film'
         WHEN pair_total = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN pair_total BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(top_genre_count::float / pair_total)::numeric, 3) AS avg_top_genre_concentration
FROM pair_top_genre
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY MIN(pair_total);

WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        t.id AS movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
pair_totals AS (
    SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS pair_total
    FROM pair_films
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
),
pair_genre_counts AS (
    SELECT
        pf.director_id,
        pf.actor_id,
        pt.pair_total,
        mi.info AS genre,
        COUNT(DISTINCT pf.movie_id) AS genre_film_count
    FROM pair_films pf
    JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_id = pf.director_id AND pt.actor_id = pf.actor_id
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = pf.movie_id
        AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pt.pair_total, mi.info
),
pair_top_genre AS (
    SELECT
        director_id, actor_id, pair_total,
        MAX(genre_film_count) AS top_genre_count
    FROM pair_genre_counts
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, pair_total
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN pair_total = 1 THEN '1 film'
         WHEN pair_total = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN pair_total BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(top_genre_count::float / pair_total)::numeric, 3) AS avg_top_genre_concentration
FROM pair_top_genre
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY MIN(pair_total);

raw_sql:
WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        t.id AS movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
pair_totals AS (
    SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS pair_total
    FROM pair_films
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
),
pair_company_counts AS (
    SELECT
        pf.director_id,
        pf.actor_id,
        pt.pair_total,
        mc.company_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT pf.movie_id) AS company_film_count
    FROM pair_films pf
    JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_id = pf.director_id AND pt.actor_id = pf.actor_id
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = pf.movie_id
        AND mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pt.pair_total, mc.company_id
),
pair_top_company AS (
    SELECT
        director_id, actor_id, pair_total,
        MAX(company_film_count) AS top_company_count
    FROM pair_company_counts
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, pair_total
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN pair_total = 1 THEN '1 film'
         WHEN pair_total = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN pair_total BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(top_company_count::float / pair_total)::numeric, 3) AS avg_top_company_concentration
FROM pair_top_company
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY MIN(pair_total);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (pair_top_company.pair_total = 1) THEN '1 film'::text WHEN (pair_top_company.pair_total = 2) THEN '2 films'::text WHEN ((pair_top_company.pair_total >= 3) AND (pair_top_company.pair_total <= 5)) THEN '3-5 films'::text ELSE '6+ films'::text END

raw_sql:
WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        t.id AS movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
pair_totals AS (
    SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS pair_total
    FROM pair_films
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
),
pair_ratings AS (
    SELECT
        pf.director_id,
        pf.actor_id,
        pt.pair_total,
        AVG(mii_r.info::float) AS avg_rating
    FROM pair_films pf
    JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_id = pf.director_id AND pt.actor_id = pf.actor_id
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii_r ON mii_r.movie_id = pf.movie_id
        AND mii_r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pt.pair_total
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN pair_total = 1 THEN '1 film'
         WHEN pair_total = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN pair_total BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_imdb_rating,
    ROUND(STDDEV(avg_rating)::numeric, 2) AS rating_stddev
FROM pair_ratings
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY MIN(pair_total);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (pair_ratings.pair_total = 1) THEN '1 film'::text WHEN (pair_ratings.pair_total = 2) THEN '2 films'::text WHEN ((pair_ratings.pair_total >= 3) AND (pair_ratings.pair_total <= 5)) THEN '3-5 films'::text ELSE '6+ films'::text END

raw_sql:
WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        t.id AS movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
pair_totals AS (
    SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS pair_total
    FROM pair_films
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
),
pair_keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT
        pf.director_id,
        pf.actor_id,
        pt.pair_total,
        mk.keyword_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT pf.movie_id) AS kw_film_count
    FROM pair_films pf
    JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_id = pf.director_id AND pt.actor_id = pf.actor_id
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = pf.movie_id
    GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pt.pair_total, mk.keyword_id
),
pair_top_keyword AS (
    SELECT
        director_id, actor_id, pair_total,
        MAX(kw_film_count) AS top_kw_count
    FROM pair_keyword_counts
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, pair_total
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN pair_total = 1 THEN '1 film'
         WHEN pair_total = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN pair_total BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(top_kw_count::float / pair_total)::numeric, 3) AS avg_top_keyword_concentration
FROM pair_top_keyword
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY MIN(pair_total);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (pair_top_keyword.pair_total = 1) THEN '1 film'::text WHEN (pair_top_keyword.pair_total = 2) THEN '2 films'::text WHEN ((pair_top_keyword.pair_total >= 3) AND (pair_top_keyword.pair_total <= 5)) THEN '3-5 films'::text ELSE '6+ films'::text END
